raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declaration of ongoing personal transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "identity is malleable and subject to conscious revision",
    "social or psychological roles can be selectively discarded",
    "self-acceptance and evolution can occur simultaneously",
    "future aspects of self can be embodied in the present"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a sequence of parallel, metaphorically consistent affirmations of change",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement functions as motivational language that supports psychological flexibility and self-compassion without requiring literal interpretation",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as a factual description of psychological mechanisms or used to deny stable traits and external constraints"
}
